example: The convex mirror in the hallway made the space appear larger than it actually was.
The honeycomb displayed a hexagonal arrangement of cells, efficiently utilizing space in the beehive.
The concave mirror focused the light into a single point, making it perfect for starting a fire.
The school auditorium had trapezoidal seating arrangements, optimizing sightlines for a better view of the stage.
The curvilinear shape of the modern sculpture in the park contrasted sharply with the surrounding geometric structures.
The computer graphics program allowed users to create polygonal shapes for various design purposes.
The ornate mirror had an annular frame, adding a touch of elegance to the room.
The gemstone had an ellipsoidal cut, enhancing its brilliance with a unique oval shape.
The satellite dish is parabolic, designed to focus signals at a single point.
The table in the conference room had an octagonal surface, providing ample space for discussions.
The chemist explained that a methane molecule has a tetrahedral geometry, with the carbon atom at the center.
The decorative tiles on the patio had a pentagonal pattern, creating an interesting geometric design.
The birthday hat was cone-shaped, adorned with colorful patterns for a festive look.
The gymnast executed a perfect flip, displaying a coiled form in mid-air before landing gracefully.
The exhaust system of the car included tubular components for efficient gas flow.
The ancient Mayan temple had a pyramidal structure, showcasing architectural precision.
The toroidal doughnut was freshly baked and glazed, tempting everyone with its sweet aroma.
The plant's bulbous roots stored nutrients through the dry season.
The rug in the living room was an attractive oblong with intricate patterns.
